content:
MODULE: cosmos.web.routes.websocket
FILE: cosmos/web/routes/websocket.py (135 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: WebSocket & Live Dashboard Routes

Endpoints:
- WS /ws/live - Real-time event WebSocket
- GET /live - Live dashboard page
- GET /api/sessions - list active sessions
- GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/graph - Session action graph
- GET /health - Health check

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def websocket_live(websocket: WebSocket)
- async def live_dashboard(request: Request)
- async def get_sessions()
- async def get_session_graph(session_id: str)
- async def health()
